name: Case 4127-A — Nexus-6 escape
motd: load and zoom images. issue retirement notices.
you are a blade runner. you know what to do.

vk: It's your birthday. Someone gives you a calfskin wallet.
enhance: enhance ................. give me a hardcopy right there.

/case.txt.content:
LAPD // BLADE RUNNER UNIT 419
File: 4127-A
----------------------------------------
Six Nexus-6 combat models off-world.
Two retired in attempting to breach Tyrell.
Four at large in the city.
Proceed with caution. They are stronger than you.

/memo.txt.content:
Bryant: 'You know the score, pal. If you're not cop, you're little people.'
--
They don't advertise for killers in the newspaper.
That was my profession. Ex-cop. Ex-blade runner. Ex-killer.

/subjects/batty.dat.content:
ROY BATTY // Nexus-6 // combat
The leader. Talks too much for a machine. Talks like it matters.

/subjects/rachael.dat.crackSuccessMessage: tyrell vault peeled open. she doesn't know what she is.

RACHAEL // experimental subject

[Deckard, you of all people. how can it not know what it is?]
